scripts.build: npm run build -w @valv/core && npm run build -w @valv/prisma && npm run build -w @valv/clickhouse && npm run build -w @valv/postgres && npm run build -w @valv/mcp-sdk && npm run build -w @valv/mcp
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/prisma && tsc --noEmit -p packages/clickhouse && tsc --noEmit -p packages/postgres && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp-sdk && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp && tsc --noEmit -p tests
